sourceRef: tip:Preparing for a chapter change mid-career

slides.headline: Prepare for a Chapter Change
slides.body: Transition smoothly with our step-by-step guide.

slides.headline: Understand Your Current Chapter
slides.body: Know the benefits, eligibility, and requirements of your current Chapter 33.
bullets: Check if you're meeting the 85/15 rule

slides.headline: Research New Chapter Options
slides.body: Explore Chapter 31, 35, and Post-9/11 GI Bill to find the best fit.
bullets: Look into educational benefits for your field

slides.headline: Gather Necessary Documentation
slides.body: Collect forms and documents needed for the new Chapter.

slides.headline: Submit the Application
slides.body: File your application for the new Chapter with the State Approving Agency (SAA).

slides.headline: Monitor Your Eligibility
slides.body: Stay informed about changes to your eligibility and new requirements.
Link in bio for more tips.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Transition smoothly with our step-by-step guide. Cover all bases with our VASCO Playbook: Chapter Change. Get the full guide and more tips by following the link in our bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, 'Monitor Your Eligibility,' as it could benefit from a more detailed bullet point to ensure clarity.
